items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy, signalling continued investment in strengthening the country's cyber defences. Separately, insurer QBE reports that AI is now linked to approximately half of all Australian cyber incidents — a significant reminder that the same technology making work easier is also helping criminals craft more convincing attacks.

Although phishing volumes have dropped globally by around 20%, attacks are becoming more sophisticated and harder to spot. Stay alert to unusual emails, even ones that look professional and personalised. **Tip:** If an email asks you to click a link or share credentials, verify the request directly with the sender by phone before acting.

featured.title: AI linked to half of Australian cyber incidents, QBE
featured.quote: AI involvement in over a quarter of Australian cyber incidents reveals emerging threat landscape.
